_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for the DNA double helix (Class 12 Molecular Basis of Inheritance). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
alt: A segment of the DNA double helix
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Sugar-phosphate backbone
hotspots.detail: The alternating sugar and phosphate units forming the two outer strands of the helix.

hotspots.label: Adenine
hotspots.detail: A purine base; always pairs with thymine via two hydrogen bonds.

hotspots.label: Thymine
hotspots.detail: A pyrimidine base; always pairs with adenine.

hotspots.label: Guanine
hotspots.detail: A purine base; always pairs with cytosine via three hydrogen bonds.

hotspots.label: Cytosine
hotspots.detail: A pyrimidine base; always pairs with guanine.

hotspots.label: Hydrogen bonds
hotspots.detail: Weak bonds holding complementary base pairs together, allowing the strands to separate for replication.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational biology illustration of a short segment of a DNA double helix, shown as a clean structural diagram. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: the sugar-phosphate backbone of both strands, the four nitrogenous bases (adenine, thymine, guanine, cytosine) as paired rungs, and the hydrogen bonds connecting each base pair. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted palette with each base type a distinct muted color. Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: a vertical double helix segment, centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Portrait 3:4, high resolution.
